title: crotalaria cambodiensis
intro: Crotalaria cambodiensis is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various skin conditions such as eczema and psoriasis due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria cambodiensis include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and even exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Crotalaria cambodiensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential side effects.
